title: Unify all controller mutations under checkout authority
description: Use the same checkout-wide durable controller lease for run execution, planning apply, and dashboard note/approve/reject actions. Avoid self-deadlock/reentrancy and release safely. Fix autonomous checkpoint selection against production graphs that omit awaiting tasks: fetch inclusive detail or safely inject only the exact tk-next-selected child. Add cross-surface concurrency and production-shape tests.
acceptance_criteria: Run/plan/dashboard tracker or Git mutations cannot race in one checkout; autonomous production checkpoints work without allowing arbitrary graph injection; tests pass.
